theme.description: Futuristic, high-energy neon dark mode with glassmorphism overlays and floating particles. The aesthetic relies on ultra-deep matte blacks punctuated by two interchangeable neon accent colors (Lime Green or Aqua/Cyan).

layout_and_spacing.padding_philosophy: Generous. Sections should use py-24 or py-32 to breathe. Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-8).
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl for primary cards, rounded-full for buttons and pills.

motion_and_interactions.global: Subtle float animations for background elements. Scroll-triggered fade-up and stagger for lists.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-2), borders glow with the active theme color (shadow-[0_0_20px_var(--glow)]).
motion_and_interactions.tracing_beam: Use Aceternity-style moving gradient borders for Pricing and Course cards to simulate electricity/energy.

header.style: Crystal Glass: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/5
elements: Buy me a coffee / Support button (Right)

hero.layout: Grid split (text on left, floating image card on right).
hero.visuals: Floating glowing particles in the background. The hero image should be inside a glassmorphic card with a neon border. Use `Unbounded` for the massive headline.
hero.cta: Primary button with pulsing neon shadow and hover effect.
hero.image_overlay: bg-gradient-to-r from-black/80 via-black/40 to-transparent for text readability.

course_catalog.layout: Bento Grid or masonry-style staggered cards.
course_catalog.card_style: Dark surface (#0A0A0A) with 1px border. On hover, the border illuminates in the active theme color.

pricing.style: Bold, center-aligned section. The main pricing card (97 BRL) must have the most aggressive neon styling.

study_tools.description: A section showing simulated tools like Metronome and Tuner. Use mono fonts and high-contrast neon borders to look like a digital dashboard.

testimonials.layout: Use react-fast-marquee. Cards with minimal opacity backgrounds floating horizontally.

footer.layout: Massive bottom padding (py-32). Giant brand text at the bottom. Contact info and social links.

floating_elements.back_to_top: Fixed bottom-right button, neon outline, backdrop blur, appears on scroll.
floating_elements.background_shapes: Absolute positioned blurred circles (blur-[120px]) in dark grey or low-opacity active theme color.

musician_hero.alt: Musician in futuristic attire with electric guitar

course_acoustic.alt: Man playing acoustic guitar in the dark

course_drums.alt: Dimly lit drum set on stage

accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (theme toggle, language toggle, buy buttons, tool triggers) MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='theme-toggle-btn').
accessibility.contrast: Text must meet APCA standards against backgrounds. Use text-shadow over images if necessary.

technical_notes.context_state: Need a React Context or Zustand store to manage activeTheme ('lime' | 'aqua') and language ('pt' | 'en') globally so the UI reacts instantly.
